tweets.text:
Hi, I’m Joshua Lorcy!

Pokemon VGC player & Community Ambassador with 6 years of tournament experience and 3 years casting grassroots and unofficial Pokemon events.

I enjoy breaking down gameplay while keeping broadcasts engaging for both new and experienced viewers.

DMs open!

Curious on which Pokémon are good in the meta? Me and @unironicpanda teamed up to bring you an updated tierlist, going over the meta in depth togerher and talking about new trends. Make sure to check it out to hear our hot takes!
